horoscope: With the Moon's move into your solar eighth house today, dear Aries, thinking, journaling, or ruminating can get you into better touch with your inner needs, wants, and motivations. You're likely to gravitate to quiet, healing activities. This two-day transit is beneficial, as you can learn a lot about yourself and others through observation. Your responsibility, reliability, and maturity are most appealing, especially as the day advances, with Venus moving into harmony with Saturn in your sign. Fleeting excitement or newness is not as interesting to you as enjoying trusted friends, family, or pet projects. Humbling yourself a little can be most useful, as this helps you recognize good advice and benefit from others' experiences and wisdom. Saturn transiting your sign is not all about limits and blockages; you're learning to see yourself and the world around you more realistically, which is empowering as you reduce feelings of guilt and disappointment.

The Moon moves into your partnership sector today, dear Taurus, which tends to bring you into a more sociable mood, or one in which you'd prefer to share your ideas or activities with someone. There are times to go solo, and there are times to be with others, and today's energies favor the latter. You might take some pleasure in simplifying an area of your life as the day progresses, particularly in your inner world, home, or family life. It's a great time to lay down some rules, structures, and goals that strengthen you and your loved ones in fundamental ways. Clearing up unfinished emotional business can be satisfying. Gestures that show others you care can be remembered and appreciated, as they have more staying power than usual! Your sentiments can be powerful. Solid efforts put forth toward securing your life, even in small ways, can pay off now.

The Moon moves into your work and health sector today, dear Gemini, and you become more aware of and sensitive to details. A focus on daily routines or details can be comforting. Taking care of business or chores can sometimes help take the pressure off overthinking other areas of your life, and that's likely the case today. Especially as the day advances, you can enjoy feeling on top of things and getting organized. A Venus-Saturn transit comes into play, and it favors teamwork, agreements, and activities that help strengthen a project or friendship. Or, there can be a person or group that encourages you to pursue an idea or interest to your benefit, or who supports and reinforces you.

The Moon heads into your creative and romantic sector today, dear Cancer, and you're likely in the mood for some special attention or recognition for your more unique qualities. You crave more emotional involvement with the rest of the world. As the day advances, you have self-discipline on your side. Venus in your solar second house heads into harmony with Saturn, helping you see your means, resources, and relationships in a realistic light. You have a little more faith in your understanding of these matters. You're less interested in immediate gratification and more concerned about what benefits you in the long term, and, even if it means putting off personal pleasures, you are willing to do so to secure your future. Instinctively knowing your priorities is part of this, and you're in perfect shape to enjoy good advice or support from others.

The Moon moves into your home and family sector today, dear Leo, and you're drawn to familiar, comforting activities that help build confidence from the ground up. You might choose to back away from problems coming from the outside world so that you can see them from a better perspective. Venus is currently transiting your sign, and it heads into harmony with Saturn today -- a strong influence for strengthening your relationships. Your negotiation skills are above par now, and you aim to see eye to eye with others and to remain sincere and honest at the same time. You can find it easy, straightforward, and perhaps quite rewarding to express your responsible side now. Favorable reviews or solid news can figure strongly. Others are backing you up. Your reliability, experience, or wisdom are traits that people recognize in you more fully.

You enter a more curious lunar period today, dear Virgo, and it's now time for branching out and entertaining new possibilities. Reaching out to others can be rewarding during this transit that lasts over two days. You're radiating good, calm energy now, and as the day advances, you especially see the beauty in things that last. You might decide to give up a personal pleasure to gain something more significant to you in the long term. Coming to someone's aid or support might figure strongly now. You're also in a good place for drawing upon hunches and intuition to forward business-related ideas. Getting practical things done is satisfying, and it's easier with someone's help or encouragement. Diplomacy and cooperation work wonders right now. If a relationship can benefit from some maintenance, it's an excellent time to show you care.

With the Moon moving out of your sign and into your solar second house today, your emotional requirements don't appear as urgent, dear Libra. It's a good time to remind yourself of what you already have in your life and find ways to appreciate it. You have more patience. Playing it safe on an emotional level can be a helpful exercise at this time of the lunar month, as you work on making your life more comfortable and secure. Especially as the day advances, you appreciate the simple things about your established relationships, and others seem to value your company or input. You might make mutually beneficial connections, and you do particularly well with a cause and a plan. Diplomacy goes a long way, and you tend to sense this intuitively right now. Bonding with others can be satisfying, and showing affection in practical ways can be in focus. This is a good time to connect with reliable, longtime friends and partners. You're really feeling the need for authenticity in your connections.

The Moon moves into your sign today, dear Scorpio, and emotions surface, perhaps very strongly. These desires may very well pass, often as quickly as they came on in the first place, but pay attention to which ones remain. You're bound to feel more get-up-and-go now. Later today, energies support moderate rather than bold moves. You find it more comfortable than usual to perform at your best. You're simply doing things right, and your efforts don't go unnoticed! You are likely enjoying your work, and it shows in what you do. Whatever you lock down now can last a long time, making it best not to take commitments lightly today.

The Moon moves into your solar twelfth house today, dear Sagittarius, where it will visit for a couple of days, making it a good time for reflecting on your personal life, particularly with your future in mind. You might consider it a signal from the cosmos to take things easy, or easier than you have been recently, in preparation for a new cycle that will begin with the Moon's entry into your sign on Friday. As the day advances, transits are strong for feeling safe, structured, and confident enough to explore your creativity. Your view of a creative matter, project, or relationship is more realistic and less pressured. You may be dividing your time well between work and pleasure, and it can be a great time for teaching, learning, and making valuable connections. You could be working hard on something creative and expressive, adding important details or getting technical aspects just right. Relationships seem to be supportive rather than competitive, helping you get things done.

The Moon moves into your social sector today, dear Capricorn, and the need for non-competitive outlets for self-expression emerges. In fact, the less expected of you, the more naturally you contribute, share, and connect with others. You enjoy the feedback you receive from others, which tends to jump-start your own thinking. As the day advances, we approach a Venus-Saturn transit that helps you plan ahead. You're willing to forgo immediate pleasures to support a long-term win, and this strategy works well for you now. It's a robust transit for making your life feel more structured, secure, and safe. It helps to look at a situation with more realism, patience, and objectivity. Any efforts to strengthen, maintain, and build your connections can have long-lasting benefits.

The Moon moves into your career and reputation sector today, dear Aquarius, and others' expectations tend to pull you in a particular direction. You may be more aware of the rules, and you tend to want to put in the necessary effort to make life a little more orderly. As the day advances, seeing a person in your life in a realistic light can be valuable. You have a greater sense of your expectations, limits, and boundaries, helping you find a good balance. You might improve a relationship or help create links between others. Prioritizing comes naturally to you right now.

With the Moon's move into your solar ninth house today, dear Pisces, you feel the need to feed your spirit. Larger issues come into play, prompting you to think about your bigger goals and plans. Doors can open in your life for personal growth opportunities, and a broad mind is a prerequisite. As the day advances, prioritizing comes more naturally to you, both in your daily affairs and in your relationships. There can be opportunities to strengthen a project today, especially with a mature approach and particular attention to detail. Defining something can be most helpful, as clarity is constructive right now. You might take some pleasure in being practical or frugal.
